# SamplingValidation.ClientModifiableRequestFields property

The fields a client/host MAY modify or omit as part of its human-in-the-loop control over a sampling request, without communicating the change to the server (§21.2.10-e). Mirrors TS `CLIENT_MODIFIABLE_REQUEST_FIELDS`.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> ClientModifiableRequestFields { get; }
```
